title: RTE Haryana Admission 2026

detail.title: RTE Haryana Admission 2026
detail.short_info: RTE Haryana Admission 2026 application is open from 9 April 2026 to 16 April 2026 at harprathmik.gov.in. Check eligibility, important dates, documents required, lottery result date, and step-by-step guide for free admission under 25% RTE quota in private schools for 2026-27 session.

content.text: The RTE Haryana Admission 2026 applications are open from 9 April 2026 to 16 April 2026 (up to 11:59:59 PM). Parents can apply online through the official RTE/Ujjwal Admission Portal for free admission under Section 12(1)(c) of the Right to Education (RTE) Act 2009 in recognized private unaided schools for the academic session 2026-27.

This opportunity is for children from Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), Disadvantaged Groups (DG), and Children with Special Needs (CWSN). Eligible children can seek admission in Nursery, LKG, UKG, and Class 1 (Grade 1). Applications must be submitted online using Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) and the child’s Aadhaar card. School selection is limited to 0-1 km and 1-3 km radius of residence. Final selection will be done through a transparent computerized lottery system. Apply before the deadline to avoid missing this chance.

rows: RTE Haryana 2026-27 (25% seats in private schools)

content.text: The detailed notification for RTE Haryana Admission 2026 was released on 6 March 2026. Private schools declared their seats from 11 to 17 March 2026, followed by verification. The notification provides the complete schedule and guidelines for admission under the Right to Education (RTE) Act.
Download Official PDF for RTE Haryana Admission 2026 Notification: Click Here

sections.heading: Documents Required for RTE Haryana Admission 2026
How to Apply for RTE Haryana Admission 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Click on the RTE Admission 2026-27 link
Register using Parivar Pehchan Patra or create new registration
Fill in child and parent details carefully
Upload scanned copies of required documents
Select preferred schools (within 1 km and 3 km radius)
Take a printout of the confirmation page
